metadata.title: Unified Shopping List Sorter
metadata.description: Unified Shopping List Sorter Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Sort managed shopping-list blocks after note edits.
ast.target: 在笔记编辑后对管理的购物清单块进行排序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay in milliseconds before sorting after an edit.
ast.target: 编辑后排序前的延迟时间（毫秒）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated store names used for grouping.
ast.target: 用于分组的商店名称，以逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Heading inserted by the shopping-list command.
ast.target: 购物清单命令插入的标题。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: aldi, dm, edeka, lidl, netto, penny, rewe
ast.target: aldi, dm, edeka, lidl, netto, penny, rewe

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No managed shopping lists needed sorting.
ast.target: 没有需要排序的管理购物清单。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Sort shopping lists in current note
ast.target: 对当前笔记中的购物清单进行排序
